mapper.sql: id, title, en_name, dept_id, division, biz_type, sys_no, serial_no, paper_reg_no, thesis_type, language, paper_source, journal, journal_name, journal_type, journal_level, pub_year, publish_date, roll, period, start_page, end_page, issn, cn_no, wos_accession_no, doi, link_url, volume_info, doc_type, words_num, journal_if, five_year_if, is_esi_cited, page_space_type, is_translation, is_managing, is_nursing, school_sign, times_cited, key_words, sci_partition, cas_partition, fund_label, proj_source_code, our_unit_ranking, number_of_authors, pub_range_code, digest, pub_unit, conf_name, conf_address, conf_intro, app_paper_id, sub_user_id, sub_date, sub_time, data_status, check_status, remark, work_count, not_count_reason, page_charge, first_author_id, first_author_name, first_author_title, first_author_sex, first_author_type, first_author_unit_id, first_author_dept_id, first_author_remark, in_first_author_id, in_first_author_ranking, in_first_author_edu_level, in_first_author_edu_degree, tf_author_id, tf_author_name, tf_author_dept_id, tf_author_unit_id, corr_author_id, corr_author_name, corr_author_ranking, corr_author_dept_id, corr_author_unit_id, corr_author_remark, is_corr_author_our, tcorr_author_id, tcorr_author_name, tcorr_author_dept_id, tcorr_author_unit_id, is_graduate, mentor1, is_graduated_two_years, mentor2, is_rejection, is_submission_changed, change_to_journa1, change_to_journa2, sub_copies, sub_elec_edition, is_credits_registered, class, discipline, discipline2, discipline3, research_field, operate_time, fina_no, is_reim, reim_way, reim_fee_amt, reim_fee_actual_amt, page_charge_inv_no, awardee_type, awardee_account, awardee_id_no, awardee_bank, awardee_bank_account, awardee_tel, reward_amt, proj_author
mapper.select: select spaper.id as rowId ,spaper.period as period, spaper.roll as roll,spaper.journal_if as journalIf, spaper.start_page as startPage,spaper.end_page as endPage,spaper.page_charge as pageCharge, spaper.reim_fee_amt as reimFeeAmt, spaper.title as title,csy.code as "pubYear.id",csy.name as "pubYear.name",csy.name as pubYearName, csptt.code as "thesisType.id",csptt.name as "thesisType.name",csptt.name as thesisTypeName, fdept.id as "deptId.id",fdept.name as "deptId.name",fdept.name as deptName, cuser.id as "corrAuthorId.id",cuser.name as "corrAuthorId.name",cuser.name as corrAuthorName, puser.id as "projAuthor.id",puser.name as "projAuthor.name",puser.name as projAuthorName, sj.code as "journal.id",sj.name as "journal.name",sj.name as journalName, spaper.publish_date as publishDate,spaper.is_nursing as isNursing,spaper.is_corr_author_our as isCorrAuthorOur, spaper.is_managing as isManaging,spaper.sub_copies as subCopies,spaper.is_reim as isReim, csjt.code as "journalType.id",csjt.name as "journalType.name",csjt.name as journalTypeName, sclass.code as "classCode.id",sclass.name as "classCode.name",sclass.name as classCodeName, fdiscipline.code as "discipline.id",fdiscipline.name as "discipline.name",fdiscipline.name as disciplineName, sdiscipline.code as "discipline2.id",sdiscipline.name as "discipline2.name",sdiscipline.name as discipline2Name, tdiscipline.code as "discipline3.id",tdiscipline.name as "discipline3.name",tdiscipline.name as discipline3Name, csuo.code as "ourUnitRanking.id",csuo.name as "ourUnitRanking.name",csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName, csrw.code as "reimWay.id",csrw.name as "reimWay.name",csrw.name as reimWayName, sprojectsource.code as "projSourceCode.id",sprojectsource.name as "projSourceCode.name",sprojectsource.name as projSourceName, csps.code as "pageSpaceType.id",csps.name as "pageSpaceType.name",csps.name as pageSpaceTypeName, csc.code as "currency.id",csc.name as "currency.name", spaper.data_status as dataStatus,spaper.serial_no as serialNo, spaper.awardee_type as awardeeType, spaper.awardee_account as awardeeAccount, spaper.awardee_id_no as awardeeIdNo, spaper.awardee_bank as awardeeBank, spaper.awardee_bank_account as awardeeBankAccount, spaper.awardee_tel as awardeeTel, spaper.reward_amt as rewardAmt, spaper.remark as remark, spaper.key_words as keyWords, spaper.digest as digest from srm_paper spaper left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=spaper.pub_year left join ct_srm_paper_thesis_type csptt on csptt.code=spaper.thesis_type left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=spaper.dept_id left join ct_srm_page_space csps on csps.code=spaper.page_space_type left join srm_journal sj on sj.code=spaper.journal left join ct_srm_journal_type csjt on csjt.code=spaper.journal_type left join ct_srm_reimbursement_way csrw on csrw.code=spaper.reim_way left join ct_srm_user fuser on fuser.id=spaper.first_author_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=spaper.corr_author_id left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=spaper.proj_author left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=spaper.classCode left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=spaper.proj_source_code left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=spaper.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=spaper.discipline2 left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=spaper.discipline3 left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=spaper.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_currency csc on csc.code=spaper.currency where spaper.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_paper
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
serial_no = #{serialNo},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
